failures.description: The Executor answered that the item does not have bagged/bagless=bagged even though ProductCatalogSearch explicitly returned bagged/bagless as bagged.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The agent had the relevant tool output at index 3: item 1345513440 has options {"bagged/bagless": "bagged"}. At index 4, the Executor synthesized the opposite answer, "No, it does not," which directly contradicts the returned evidence. This is not an invalid tool call, missing information, or unsupported intent; it is an incorrect interpretation/use of the tool result. The later Evaluator approval at index 5 compounds the issue but does not resolve it.
